summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DOEM Newsletter and Segmentos features. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed all features working correctly including 9 segments, dynamic type selector, and newsletter management.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - minor rendering issue that doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Updated doem_config in MongoDB to include proper segmentos and tipos_publicacao mapping
context_for_next_testing_agent: All DOEM Newsletter features tested and working: 1) GET /api/doem/segmentos returns 9 segments with tipos_publicacao mapping. 2) Newsletter admin endpoints (list, add, toggle, delete inscritos) all working. 3) Public newsletter subscription endpoint working. 4) Frontend DOEM page shows Newsletter button for admin users with statistics, subscriber list, and add form. 5) New Edition modal has segment selector with all 9 segments and dynamic type selector that updates based on selected segment.

doem_segmentos.tipos_publicacao_mapping: Working - each segment has specific types

doem_page.newsletter_statistics: WORKING - shows total, ativos, pendentes, por_tipo
doem_page.subscriber_list: WORKING - shows table with name, email, type, status, segments, actions
doem_page.dynamic_type_selector: WORKING - updates based on selected segment

mocked_apis.email_sending: SMTP email sending may fail if external SMTP server (mail.acaiaca.mg.gov.br:465) is not accessible. Email notifications are triggered on DOEM publication but actual delivery depends on SMTP connectivity.

database_updates.doem_config: Updated to include proper segmentos array and tipos_publicacao mapping (was previously flat list, now dict mapping segments to types)
